query: How do I reset my account password?
resolution: Go to Settings > Security > Reset Password and follow the email instructions.

query: I haven't received my order yet. It's been 5 days.
resolution: Check your email for the tracking number or visit the 'My Orders' section in your profile.

query: Can I get a refund for my last purchase?
resolution: Refunds can be requested within 30 days of purchase via the billing portal.

query: My app keeps crashing when I open the settings.
resolution: Try clearing the app cache or reinstalling the application from the App Store.

query: How do I change my subscription plan?
resolution: Navigate to Billing > Subscription and select 'Change Plan' to see available options.

query: Is there a way to update my shipping address?
resolution: You can update your address in the Profile > Personal Information section before the order is shipped.

query: Do you offer international shipping to Europe?
resolution: Yes, we ship to most European countries. Shipping fees and times vary by location.

query: I forgot my username. How can I recover it?
resolution: Click on 'Forgot Username' on the login page and enter your registered email address.

query: How can I contact customer support via phone?
resolution: Our phone support is available at +1-800-123-4567 from 9 AM to 5 PM EST.

query: Why was I charged twice for my subscription?
resolution: This may be a temporary authorization hold. Please contact our billing team with your invoice ID for a manual review.
